name: Asparagus Ham Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. In two greased 9-inch pie plates, layer the asparagus, ham, cheese, and onion.
2. In a bowl, beat the eggs.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
4. Divide the mixture in half and pour over the asparagus mixture in each pie plate.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
